reviews.school_name: St. Josephs High School - Nehru Nagar
reviews.author: Sara Juveria
reviews.review_body: Very good school for children's bright future. 🤩The teachers are truly invested in children’s education and their growth as learners. Adjustments are made as needed to meet the needs of the student.Eveled learning have enabled children's to gain confidence in their learning abilities.

reviews.school_name: St. Josephs High School - Nehru Nagar

reviews.review_body:
this school is doing good and inside class room is little congested  because of more strenth but it is the real fun of school
They are doing 200% best in this pandamic by online classes super strenth  👌👌👌👌👌👌👌👌👌👍

reviews.school_name: St. Josephs High School - Nehru Nagar
reviews.author: Nallu Sridhar
reviews.review_body: I really don't know about how they are giving study. But the school outside is very congested. The play area is very bad. It's almost nothing. they have to improve in the that aspect. Because physical activities are most important for kids to refresh.
